How it works

3 Steps to Start Earning

Simple. Transparent. No gatekeeping.

1
Create your free account
Sign up in 30 seconds. No credit card. Immediately access all creator tools and start building your profile.
2
Grow to 1,000 followers
Post content, run campaigns, collab with creators. Hit 1K followers and monetization unlocks automatically.
3
Choose your rate & get paid
Pick your payment tier, activate your income streams, and receive your first payout at month's end.

Support

Help Center

Frequently asked questions
How do I publish my first ad? +
Go to the Publish tab, fill in your ad details and click Publish. Your ad goes live instantly to the entire community.
What is AI Matching? +
Our algorithm analyzes your profile and ads to connect you automatically with the most relevant collaborators and partners.
How does the free plan work? +
The free plan lets you publish ads, access the community and use basic features with no time limit. Upgrade anytime for premium tools.
How do I upgrade to PRO? +
Go to the Shop tab and choose a plan. Payment is processed securely via Stripe with no commitment.
Can I delete my ad? +
Yes — open your ad, click the options menu and select Delete. The ad is removed immediately.
Contact support
Can't find your answer? Our team replies within 24 hours.

📚 FOUNDATIONS
CREATE AN AD ON VIRALBOOST
Step-by-step guide · 5 min
1
Create your account
Click Sign Up top right. Fill niche & audience for better matching.
2
Go to "Publish" tab
Tap ➕ Publish in the bottom bar.
3
Fill your ad details
Title · Description · Image · Link
4
Choose your format
Standard = free · Sponsor = max visibility · Big Campaign = 100K+
5
Publish & track stats
Hit Publish → live in Feed. Check 📊 Stats anytime.
WRITE AN AD THAT CONVERTS
Copywriting · Hook · CTA · 4 min
A great ad follows the AIDA model:
A — ATTENTION
Bold hook: "80% lose their audience because of this."
I — INTEREST
Describe the problem. Talk about your customer, not yourself.
D — DESIRE
Concrete benefits, numbers, social proof.
A — ACTION (CTA)
One clear CTA: "Discover the method →"
💡 Use IA Boost to auto-generate your copy with AI!
GET KNOWN ON SOCIAL MEDIA
Instagram · TikTok · YouTube · 6 min
📸 INSTAGRAM / TIKTOK
Post 3–5× per week. Reels & TikToks pushed to thousands — even 0 followers.
🎬 YOUTUBE SHORTS
30–60 sec. Free algorithmic boost. Repurpose on TikTok & Instagram.
🔑 3 GOLDEN RULES
1. Precise niche · 2. Consistency > perfection · 3. Reply in first 30 min
💡 Use Collabs tab — cross-promote & double your reach for free!
ADS ON GOOGLE & META
Google Ads · Facebook/Instagram Ads · 7 min
🔍 GOOGLE ADS
When people search what you sell. Start at $5–10/day.
📘 META ADS
Target specific audiences. Start at $3–5/day.
📋 CHECKLIST
Clear landing page with one objective
Meta Pixel / Google Tag installed
Test 2–3 different creatives (A/B)
Precise interests + Lookalike audience
💡 ViralBoost (organic) + Google/Meta (paid) = optimal strategy!
VIRAL CONTENT STRATEGY
30-day plan · Hooks · Formulas · 5 min
The 5 post types that always go viral:
1. Educational — "5 mistakes 90% of beginners make in [niche]"
2. Inspiration — Show before/after, your journey, results
3. Entertainment — Niche humor, trends, memes
4. Soft controversy — "Unpopular opinion: [your take]"
5. Engagement — Questions, polls, "Tag a friend who..."
✦
COLLABS & FREE VISIBILITY
Cross-promo · Guest post · Live collab · 4 min
Collabs = fastest free way to explode your reach:
🔄 CROSS-PROMO
Swap mentions with a niche creator. Both audiences see you. Zero budget.
🎙️ LIVE COLLAB
Go live together — both audiences follow mutually.
✍️ GUEST POST
Write for another creator's newsletter. Reach their audience + credibility.
📈 GROWTH
↗
READ & UNDERSTAND YOUR STATS
Impressions · CTR · Conversions · 6 min
👁️ IMPRESSIONS
How many people saw your ad. High impressions + low clicks = weak title/image.
🖱️ CTR (CLICK-THROUGH RATE)
Clicks ÷ Impressions. A good CTR is 2–5%. Below 1% = rewrite your CTA.
🏆 CONVERSIONS
Visitors who take the desired action. Track this with Google Analytics or Meta Pixel.
📅 OPTIMIZE WEEKLY
Check stats every 7 days. Kill underperformers. Scale winners by +20% budget.
💡 Go to 📊 Stats tab on ViralBoost to monitor your ad performance in real time!
$
$
MONETIZE YOUR AUDIENCE
Products · Affiliate · Sponsorships · 7 min
📦 SELL YOUR OWN PRODUCT
Digital products (ebook, course, template) = high margin. Start with one offer.
🔗 AFFILIATE MARKETING
Recommend products you use. Earn 5–50% commission per sale. Zero stock needed.
🤝 SPONSORSHIPS
Brands pay you to mention their product. Attainable from 1,000 followers in a niche.
💳 SUBSCRIPTIONS
Patreon, newsletter premium, private community. Recurring predictable income.
💡 Use ViralBoost Campaigns to drive traffic to your monetized offers!
DESIGN ADS THAT CATCH THE EYE
Colors · Typography · Contrast · 5 min
🎨 COLOR RULE
Max 3 colors: 1 dominant, 1 secondary, 1 accent. High contrast = more clicks.
🔤 TYPOGRAPHY
Big bold headline (60% of the visual). Sub-text smaller. Max 2 fonts.
📐 VISUAL HIERARCHY
Guide the eye: Image → Title → CTA button. Keep it clean, no clutter.
🆓 FREE TOOLS
Canva (easiest), Adobe Express, Figma (advanced). All free tiers available.
💡 Use square formats (1:1) for feed + vertical (9:16) for Stories & Reels.
⚡ ADVANCED
@
EMAIL MARKETING BASICS
List building · Sequences · Open rates · 8 min
Email = highest ROI channel ($36 earned per $1 spent). Here's how:
📋 BUILD YOUR LIST
Offer a free resource (checklist, template, mini-guide) in exchange for email. This is your lead magnet.
📧 WELCOME SEQUENCE
Send 3–5 automated emails after signup: welcome → value → soft pitch → offer.
📊 OPEN RATE TIPS
Good subject lines: curiosity, urgency, personal. Target 25–40% open rate.
💡 Use ViralBoost Newsletter tab to reach your audience via email campaigns!
↑
SEO & ORGANIC TRAFFIC
Keywords · Content · Backlinks · 8 min
SEO = free traffic forever once ranked. Here's the essentials:
🔍 KEYWORD RESEARCH
Find terms people search. Tools: Google Keyword Planner (free), Ubersuggest. Target low-competition, high-intent keywords.
📝 ON-PAGE SEO
Keyword in: title, first paragraph, H2 headers, alt text. Aim for 1,500+ words for blogs.
🔗 BACKLINKS
Other sites linking to you = authority. Guest posts on relevant blogs are the fastest way.
⚡ QUICK WIN
Create a Google Business Profile (free). Appear in local searches immediately.
💡 Combine SEO content with ViralBoost ads for organic + paid traffic simultaneously!
USE AI TO WORK 10× FASTER
ChatGPT · Canva AI · ViralBoost IA · 6 min
AI tools can do hours of work in seconds. Here's how to use them:
💬 CHATGPT / CLAUDE
Write ad copy, hooks, captions, emails, product descriptions in seconds. Prompt: "Write 5 ad headlines for [product] targeting [audience]"
🎨 CANVA AI / MIDJOURNEY
Generate ad visuals, logos, and banners from text prompts. No design skills needed.
🤖 VIRALBOOST IA BOOST
Built-in AI on ViralBoost. Generates optimized ad copy for your niche in one click.
🎬 DESCRIPT / CAPCUT AI
Auto-edit videos, add captions, remove silences, generate B-roll. Cut editing time by 80%.
💡 The most powerful combo: AI for content + ViralBoost for distribution!
More options
